page.title: Writing
page.subtitle: Pick a chapter to draft the manuscript, with autosave and AI collaboration.

emptyWork.body: Select a work on the Works page before writing.

emptyChapters.body: This work has no chapters yet. Generate chapters on the Outline page first.

page.assistantIdleHint: Select a chapter to collaborate with AI.

editor.includeRecapTooltip: Include the previous chapter’s recap; generates one automatically if none is cached
editor.quoteToChatTooltip: Send the selected text to the AI chat as a quote
editor.rewriteSelectionTooltip: Ask AI to rewrite the selected passage
editor.placeholder: Write this chapter here… (type @ to mention settings; Ctrl/Cmd+Z to undo)

assistant.title: Writing assistant
assistant.emptyHint: Ask AI for ideas, continuations, or polish tips; use @ to mention settings.

clearDialog.title: Clear chat memory
clearDialog.body: This deletes all writing-assistant messages for this chapter. It cannot be undone.

staleRecapDialog.title: Previous chapter changed
staleRecapDialog.body: The previous chapter was edited after this recap was generated. Summarize again?

rewrite.title: Rewrite passage
rewrite.instructionPlaceholder: e.g. more tense, trim dialogue, switch to first person…
rewrite.strengthenTooltip: Include two paragraphs before and after the selection as context so the rewrite fits better (only the selection is replaced)

toast.inserted: Inserted at the end of this chapter
toast.chatFailed: AI reply failed; check the LLM connection
toast.noRecapFirstChapter: This is the first chapter; there is no recap
toast.rewriteFailed: Rewrite failed; check the LLM connection

errors.noPreviousChapter: This chapter has no previous chapter
errors.previousEmpty: The previous chapter has no body text to summarize
